# Map a Route
# https://lachlanallison.github.io/map-a-route/

> Calm, fast route planner for runners and cyclists. Click to drop points, snap to real paths, view elevation, export GPX — all in the browser. No account required.

## App
- /

## Features
- Interactive map with CyclOSM (cycling) and OpenStreetMap (running) tiles
- Snap to roads and paths via Valhalla (no key) or OpenRouteService (optional user key)
- Elevation profile via Open-Meteo with Open-Elevation backup
- GPX import and export
- Out-and-back and finish-loop helpers, turn-by-turn directions
- Save routes locally in browser storage
- Light/dark theme, miles/kilometres toggle

## Privacy
- Static site; routing and elevation use third-party APIs only when planning routes
- OpenRouteService keys stored in user localStorage only

## About
- Built by Lachlan Allison: https://lachlanallison.com/
- Source: https://github.com/lachlanallison/map-a-route
- Listed on: https://localhtmltools.lachlanallison.com/
